_invariant: All edges connect exactly one token node and one protocol node. USDe-aave_v3-collateral models Ethena USDe as collateral on Aave V3 Ethereum (mono_pool, governance-controlled single AaveOracle source per asset). This snapshot records the oracle source = OLD 0x55b6...cc17 (USDe MARKET-price feed) whose depeg_sensitive = true: a real USDe depeg moves this feed and liquidates USDe/sUSDe borrowers. Identical to usde_depeg_insensitive.json except oracle.oracle_address and oracle.depeg_sensitive.

metadata._note: Ethena synthetic dollar (delta-neutral basis position). NOT a hard-redeemable fiat stablecoin; secondary-market USDe price can transiently discount during high redemptions / thin sell-side liquidity.

meta.data_source: AaveOracle.getSourceOfAsset(0x4c9E...68B3) @ block 22002624 -> 0x55b6...cc17 (OLD source = USDe MARKET-price feed, depeg-sensitive) [MEASURED 2026-06-07]. depeg_sensitive=true classified from feed TYPE (a live USDe market quote: latestAnswer @22002624 = $0.998857, tracks the USDe secondary-market rate) + Aave gov rationale (a USDe deviation moves this feed and liquidates borrowers).
